reviews.comment:
Buen lugar. Destaco la limpieza de los baños públicos.
Podes recargar agua caliente para el mate sin costo

(Translated by Google)
Nice place. I especially appreciated the cleanliness of the public restrooms.
You can refill your hot water bottle for mate for free.

reviews.comment:

Spotless bathrooms, spacious open area which makes it easy for so many tourists to get around!

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar!!!!! Buenos sanitarios!! E higiene!!!!Y gran surtido de sándwiches  tartas,empanadas, gaseosas, aguas distintosgustos, medias lunas,helados etc!!!!! Precios termino medio!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place!!!!! Good restrooms!! And hygiene!!!! And a great selection of sandwiches, pies, empanadas, sodas, flavored waters, croissants, ice cream, etc.!!!!! Mid-range prices!!!
